title: Software Engineer // Cyberoni LLC
description: Engineered the flagship digital infrastructure for Cyberoni, including a high-performance services store and a bespoke CMS for content delivery. Managed and scaled client-facing solutions using Next.js, Vercel, and Stripe integration, ensuring architectural integrity across diverse project deployments.

title: Independent Artisan // Freelance Full Stack
description: Forged bespoke digital solutions for over 25 global clients. Engineered a vast portfolio including Chrome extensions, cross-platform mobile apps (React Native), and diverse front-end systems (Vue, Svelte, React). Specialized in building robust backend utilities using Node.js and Python for complex automation tasks.

title: System Operator // IBM India
description: Trained in the bedrock of critical computing: Z/os Mainframe systems. Provided mission-critical support for massive bulk data processing environments. Provided technical support for various software changes for the Mainframe systems of Bank of Ireland and Element Financials. Learnt the use of various tools such as CA7, NetView, ISPF and SMP/e.

title: Research Developer Intern // Queue Solutions (Univ. of Melbourne)
description: Collaborated with Dr. Leon Sterling to architect a React-based simulation platform. Forged a visual interface to showcase advanced motivational models for project management, translating complex academic theories into an interactive digital tool.

title: Instrumentation Intern // NTPC Power Plant
description: Studied the intersection of industrial hardware and digital monitoring at the Ballabgarh Power Plant. Calibrated sensors and instruments for critical control flows, including furnace thermal regulation, water purity analysis, and steam temperature management for large-scale energy production.
